nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms after 4am. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 77. Southeast wind around 5 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.

nws.shortForecast: Chance Showers And Thunderstorms then Showers And Thunderstorms Likely
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms before 7am, then showers and thunderstorms likely between 7am and 1pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 88. Heat index values as high as 98. East wind 5 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New rainfall amounts between a half and three quarters of an inch possible.
